mapper.sql: select m.message_id, m.message_type, m.message_title, m.message_content, m.message_level, m.business_type, m.business_id, m.status, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, case when r.read_id is null then '0' else '1' end as read_status from biz_message m left join biz_message_read r on m.message_id = r.message_id and r.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into biz_message
message_type, message_title, message_content, message_level, business_type, business_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time
#{messageType}, #{messageTitle}, #{messageContent}, #{messageLevel}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate()
insert into biz_message_read(message_id, user_id, read_time, create_time) values(#{messageId}, #{userId}, sysdate(), sysdate())
